cases.name: blog_canonical_route
cases.expected: source_module=blog and entity_type=blog_post derive /modules/blog?slug=... from a bounded safe projected slug

cases.name: blog_fail_closed
cases.expected: wrong source module, missing slug, non-string slug, traversal, spaces, and overlong slugs remain non-navigable

cases.name: product_and_content_routes
cases.expected: product and content routes are derived by the same Search-owned policy

cases.name: content_kind_injection
cases.expected: unsafe source-module values cannot inject additional query parameters

cases.name: graphql_owner_projection
cases.expected: GraphQL result mapping delegates to canonical_search_result_url

cases.name: storefront_native_owner_projection
cases.expected: native storefront result mapping delegates to canonical_search_result_url before crossing the server-function boundary

cases.name: admin_native_owner_projection
cases.expected: Search admin mapping delegates to canonical_search_result_url from its focused mapping part

cases.name: admin_shell_owner_projection
cases.expected: admin global search delegates to canonical_search_result_url and accepts canonical Blog result types

cases.name: no_transport_fallback
cases.expected: storefront transport selection returns backend-projected URLs directly and no navigation compatibility module exists

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute rustok-search engine URL policy tests
execute GraphQL storefrontSearch against projected Blog documents
execute native storefront search and confirm canonical URLs are present
execute Search admin preview and admin global search against product, content, and Blog results
verify click analytics records the canonical href
verify malformed Blog payloads remain non-navigable through every transport
